features: Colgate Plax Cool Mint Alcohol Free
description: Product Description Colgate Plax Cool Mint Alcohol Free Directions Use Colgate Plax twice a day. Fill the cork line upwards and rinse the mouth thoroughly for 30 seconds. Then spit. Not recommended for children under 6 years. Safety Warning Do not swallow, keep out of reach of children under 6 years of age Box Contains 6 x Mouth wash bottles See more
